 more
 Press ctrl+o to show full startup help and loaded resources.

 Pi can explain its own features and look up its docs. Ask it how to use or
 extend Pi.


 Warning: tmux extended-keys is off. Modified Enter keys may not work. Add `set
 -g extended-keys on` to ~/.tmux.conf and restart tmux.

 Update Available
 New version 0.75.5 is available. Run pi update
